calendarSync.title: Calendar Sync
calendarSync.subtitle: Manage your calendar synchronization settings
calendarSync.bullet1: Events from your external calendars are automatically synced to Practical Manager
calendarSync.bullet3: Changes in your external calendar will override local changes (conflict resolution: external-wins)
calendarSync.bullet4: You can enable/disable sync for each calendar provider independently

home.heroDescription: Transform your team's productivity with our all-in-one project management platform. Streamline workflows, track progress, and achieve your goals with clarity and confidence.
home.joinDescription: Join thousands of teams who are simplifying their workflows and boosting productivity with our all-in-one platform.
home.ctaDescription: Get a live demo from one of our specialists and see how Practical Manager can work for you.

featuredModules.recognitionDesc: Share recognition and feedback to foster a positive culture.
